Services: Women, Infants & Children (WIC) Program
Overview
May 4, 2016
Women, Infants & Children (WIC) Program
Are you pregnant, have kids under 5? Then, WIC may be for you! WIC can be of support during difficult times.  We offer, nutrition information, breastfeeding support and education, link you to other services AND, offer healthy foods for you and your family every month! WIC is also for foster families or guardians raising children 0-5 years of age.
Participating in WIC is easier than ever!
Services
WIC helps you learn how to eat healthy,
supports breastfeeding
and helps you afford . To learn more about WIC’s services, check out the videos below.
WIC: Supporting Parents & Families for 45 Years
WIC: Supporting You On Your Breastfeeding Goals
Who is Eligible
Families with limited income, according to
guidelines from the California Department of Public Health
may qualify for WIC. WIC is for you if you have limited income and are:
Pregnant, breastfeeding or just had a baby.
Raising children under the age of 5.
A foster parent or a Legal Gurdian raising children under 5.
Call us to see if you qualify!
How to Apply
Call (650) 573-2168 to schedule your in-person or phone appointment.
You can also use this
prescreening tool
to see if you may be eligible, call to see if you qualify!

Post
February 5, 2018
Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) Breastfeeding Support Groups
It takes a village
Having a child is a very exciting but sometimes
 parents can feel overwhelmed by the changes in having a new
 baby. Breastfeeding support groups improve mental health in
 families, increase self-esteem and confidence, and help meet
 breastfeeding goals.  You can do it!
Check back soon to learn about upcoming Support
 Sessions!
Call 650-573-2168 for more information!
Read more
Post
August 16, 2017
World Breastfeeding Week
Enabling Breastfeeding, Making a Difference For Working Parents #WBW2023
World Breastfeeding Week is a celebration of support, promotion
 and advocacy for Breastfeeding around the globe.  WIC is
 proud to collaborate with partners every year to promote
 Breastfeeding and WIC as a Breastfeeding Program and Resource for
 our communities.  This year the World Alliance for
 Breastfeeding Action focuses on supporting breastfeeding at the
 workplace!
